assignments.name: =novoTituloCard
=novoTituloCard
nomeProduto
assignments.value: ={{ (() => {   const fields = $json.data?.card?.fields ?? [];    const repoItem = fields     .flatMap(field => field.connectedRepoItems ?? [])     .find(item => item?.url === 'https://app.pipefy.com/apollo_databases/306808931/records/1268859019');    if (repoItem?.title) {     return repoItem.title;   }    return fields.find(field => field.field?.id === 'tipo_de_item')?.value ?? ''; })() }}

assignments.name: dataFatura
assignments.value: ={{ (() => {   const createdAt = $json.data?.card?.createdAt;   if (!createdAt) return '';    const date = new Date(createdAt);   const mes = date.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR', { month: 'long', timeZone: 'UTC' });   const ano = date.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR', { year: 'numeric', timeZone: 'UTC' });    return `${mes}/${ano}`; })() }}

parameters.query: mutation UpdateCardTitle($id: ID!, $title: String!) { updateCard(input: { id: $id, title: $title }) { card { id title updated_at } } }
